data.title: Volunteers impacted by FSH Muscular Dystrophy rally for fundraising events across US and Canada in Sept-Oct 2025.
data.description: In September and October of 2025, the Walk & Roll to Cure FSHD will convene communities in the U.S. and Canada with the goal of raising funds and awareness for FSHD. The events bring together families, friends, and neighbors in Randolph, Mass. to support this cause.

data.title: Anika granted 2,500 stock options at $9.15 per share under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) for new employee.
data.description: On September 2, 2025, Anika Therapeutics, Inc. granted 2,500 non-statutory stock options for common stock at an exercise price of $9.15 per share to a newly hired non-executive employee. This grant, equaling the closing price of common stock on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on the grant date, is part of the Anika Therapeutics, Inc. 2021 Inducement Plan. The approval for this grant came from the compensation committee of the board of directors and aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) as it serves as a material inducement for the employee's acceptance of employment with Anika.

data.title: Deportations rise to match slow hiring amid decreasing labor demand, maintaining a 'curious balance'.
data.description: The arrival of a substantial number of immigrants alleviated worker shortages, but now their removal is concealing the country's diminishing need for labor.

data.title: Earnings report scheduled for Sep 5, 2025: ABM Indus expected to report $0.95 per share on revenue of $2.15 billion.
data.description: Before the market opens, ABM Industries is expected to announce its quarterly earnings at $0.95 per share with revenues reaching around $2.15 billion. The full report can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ruth Croft wins UTMB 2025 with Amazfit gear. She used Helio Strap & T-Rex 3 Pro smartwatch.
data.description: In a recent event in Chamonix, France, Pro Ultra Trail Runner Ruth Croft emerged as the standout performer in the UTMB race. She showcased exceptional performance, utilizing the cutting-edge technology of Amazfit's Helio Strap and the latest Amazfit T-Rex 3 Pro smartwatch. The event garnered significant attention through various media channels, showcasing the growing trend of integrating innovative wearable technology in high-performance sports.

data.title: AI use in project management doubled in 2 years, with 70% using AI now. Only 1% don't use or plan to. 29% planning to adopt. APM survey data.
data.description: In London, a recent survey by the Association for Project Management (APM) in partnership with research company Censuswide revealed a significant increase in the utilization of AI within projects. The study shows that the adoption of AI has almost doubled in two years, with 70% of project professionals stating that their organization currently incorporates AI. Only a small fraction, specifically 1% of project managers, confirmed that their organization does not use AI with no plans to introduce it. Furthermore, 29% of project managers indicated that their company is intending to implement AI in the near future. These statistics indicate a growing trend towards integrating AI technology into project management practices.

data.title: Amazfit launches T-Rex 3 Pro smartwatch with rugged titanium design and integrated flashlight for outdoor enthusiasts.
data.description: In Berlin, Amazfit has revealed the newest addition to their lineup, the Amazfit T-Rex 3 Pro. This rugged smartwatch is tailored for trailrunners, endurance athletes, and outdoor enthusiasts. With its durable design and advanced features, the T-Rex 3 Pro aims to cater to the needs of individuals engaged in outdoor activities.
